name: CryptChat
description: Privacy-focused, no-account E2E encrypted chat. Backend + frontend monorepo.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d db
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
